summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 7 — Real Communication + RM Execution Continuity. Backend: 27/27 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working including OnboardingMonitor with per-channel delivery status, RM Dashboard alerts bell with badge, RMLeadDetail Shortlist tab with search/add/remove/share/history, and Public ShortlistPublicPage with venue cards and preference buttons.

part_7a_onboarding_delivery.send_onboarding_with_email: PASS - Sends email via Resend with delivery status tracking
part_7a_onboarding_delivery.send_onboarding_both_channels: PASS - Supports multiple channels in single request
part_7a_onboarding_delivery.fallback_suggestion: PASS - Suggests WhatsApp when email fails or is missing
part_7a_onboarding_delivery.onboarding_monitor_ui: PASS - Shows Send History with per-channel delivery status badges

part_7b_shortlist_workflow.get_shortlist: PASS - Returns shortlist with enriched venue details
part_7b_shortlist_workflow.share_shortlist: PASS - POST /api/workflow/{lead_id}/share-shortlist generates share token and WhatsApp link
part_7b_shortlist_workflow.view_public_shortlist: PASS - GET /api/shortlist/{share_token} returns public shortlist with venue details
part_7b_shortlist_workflow.feedback_persisted: PASS - Feedback visible on subsequent view with feedback_received flag
part_7b_shortlist_workflow.rm_lead_detail_shortlist_tab: PASS - Shows search, add, remove, share, share history
part_7b_shortlist_workflow.public_shortlist_page: PASS - Renders venue cards with preference buttons (Interested/Maybe/Not For Me)
part_7b_shortlist_workflow.feedback_submitted_banner: PASS - Shows 'Preferences received' banner after submission

part_7c_rm_alerts.alerts_returns_data: PASS - Returns alerts array with total and unread_count
part_7c_rm_alerts.alerts_types: PASS - Includes new_assignment, overdue_followup, upcoming_followup, blocker_reminder
part_7c_rm_alerts.alerts_required_fields: PASS - Each alert has type, lead_id, title, description, priority, created_at
part_7c_rm_alerts.alerts_sorted_by_priority: PASS - Sorted by priority (high first) then recency
part_7c_rm_alerts.rm_dashboard_bell_icon: PASS - Shows bell icon with red badge showing alert count (3)
part_7c_rm_alerts.alerts_dropdown: PASS - Opens dropdown with alerts grouped by priority

critical_code_review_comments: onboarding.py: Real email delivery via Resend with proper error handling and fallback suggestions
shortlist.py: Well-structured with RM endpoints (add/remove/share) and public endpoints (view/feedback)
workflow.py: Alerts endpoint generates stateless alerts based on current data (no stored notifications)
venues.py: quick-search endpoint properly validates min query length
RMDashboard.js: Bell icon with badge count, alerts dropdown with priority grouping
RMLeadDetail.js: Shortlist tab with search, add/remove, share button, share history with Responded status
ShortlistPublicPage.js: Clean mobile-first design with venue cards, preference buttons, feedback submission
OnboardingMonitor.js: Send History shows per-channel delivery status (delivered/Ready/failed/skipped)

test_data.test_acquisition: acq_96bd550290e2 (Grand Celebration Hall, 10 sends in history)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from Phase 5/6
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 Real Communication fully tested. Part A: Onboarding delivery via Resend email (REAL) + WhatsApp deep links (MOCKED - wa.me). OnboardingMonitor shows per-channel delivery status. Part B: Shortlist workflow at /api/workflow/{lead_id}/shortlist/*, public page at /shortlist/:shareToken. Part C: Alerts at /api/workflow/rm/alerts, bell icon in RMDashboard header. All features working correctly.

mocked_apis_list: WhatsApp dispatch (wa.me deep link - tap-to-send, not server-side)
